_readme: Persistent store of baked paper templates. Each entry is added via the admin panel (?admin=1) → Parse & Generate → Copy JSON entry. Claude reads this file at the start of each session to know what templates exist and inject them into BAKED_TEMPLATES in index.html.
_format: { subject, paperKey, year, totalMarks, questions: [{n, topic, subtopic, parts: [{l, topic, topics, subtopic, marks}]}] }
